Notes Perfumers About

French Avenue perfumes and colognes

Country: United Arab Emirates
Main activity: Fragrances
Brand website: link
Parent company: Fragrance World Trading LLC

Designer French Avenue has 141 perfumes in our fragrance base. French Avenue is a new fragrance brand. The earliest edition was created in 2021 and the newest is from 2025. French Avenue fragrances were made in collaboration with perfumers Jean-Louis Sieuzac, Shinichiro Oba, Carole Calmettes, Jean-Christophe Hérault, Olaf Larsen, Jordi Fernández, Meabh (Mave) Mc Curtin, Dominique Ropion, Miroslav Petkov, Elodie Bernard, Santosh Shinde, Dalia Izem, Anne-Louise Gautier, Nathalie Templer, Amandine Galliano, Dalia Izzem, Julien Rasquinet, David Benedek and Meabh McCurtin.

Collections

Latest Reviews

Carthusia

Mediterraneo

by Hayatsu
Want to smell like an actual lemon, lemon juice with 90% lemon 10% sugar, sour lemon candy and lemon cleaning disinfectant? This one is the one for you

Escada

Yum me, Sunny!

by KöbiD
Yummy tropical fruit cocktail! There are definitely more notes than the listing here lets you believe. I also smell some mango and pineapple, not too dissimilar to Bali Paradise. I would not mind a bit more sweetness and a bit less musk, but all in all a typical Escada summer fragrance you can...

Afnan

Supremacy in Oud

by djsithassassin
Skin Scent: 16 hours Clothing: 1-2 days Projection: 4-5 hours Sillage: Nuclear/Beast-Mode Smell: 11/10 Price: 9/10, Got it $65USD for Premium Edition (EDP 100ml, Shower gel 150ml & deodorant 100ml included) Use All 3 Creates Your Sillage Hypersonic Nuclear vs. Only EDP, Just Nuclear Not...

Calvin Klein

Euphoria Solar Elixir

by kloobnika
It's not unique but the burst of juicy mango is gorgeous. Dry down is generic perfumy vanilla but has great lasting power. Reminds me of 00s Escada, sometimes you just want to smell pretty.

Armaf

Odyssey Go Mango

by Solar Girl
Beautiful juicy mango for the first 30 min. However the drydown is chemical mess (concoction of aromachemicals, like you enter a chemical factory). So sad for this, i bought it on the spot after trying it in the shop. If only the whole duration was as good as the opening, it would have been the...

Natura

Homem Cor.Agio

by TanoSD
Al contrario de lo que todos opinan, creo que es un perfume excelente para verano. Es dulce, si, pero no un dulce que sofoca. Su dulzor se debe principalmente a la Tonka, no a vainillas y creo que eso es lo que lo hace más versátil. Lo uso principalmente en primavera y verano

Bvlgari

Tygar

by KToonzy
Synthetic citrus-based detergent. Feels like a cheapy perfume with linear basic scent. Over-Hyped !

Dior

Pure Poison

by MademoiselleMaya
The newer Pure Poison is a dreamy musky floral with prominent cool and creamy gardenia and a few voices from the accompanying sweet jasmine and fresh orange blossom. A perfect companion for a misty spring. I think Dior should bring back the entire dreamy apple series. For the new generation to...

Lattafa Perfumes

Yara

by PinkieSprinkleyPies
This is the type of scent that you wear at night, it smells so delicious and creamy! The only issue I have with it is that it does not project that much and the longevity is soooo little. It's good if you're wearing it for a quick "pick-me-up" but don't expect for it to...

Khadlaj Perfumes

Shiyaaka Shadow

by djsithassassin
Skin Scent: 13 hours Clothing: 1 day Projection: 4 hours Sillage: Almost Nuclear/Beast-Mode But Not Maximum Spray: 6 on skin, 4 on clothes, above is headache EDP/Extrait: Extrait Stronger on Skin/Clothes: Both Smell: 11/10 - Sexy masculine leaning drydown/initial Gender: Men (Hard for Feminine To...

Mugler

Alien Man

by JayLee29
Stellar. One of the best casual/office scents ever. So good. Very green, very pungent, very fresh. So unique. I love it, one of my favorites. The dill note is the star here but in such a good way. Really hard to describe it but alien man is a great name for it because it's so different than...

J-Scent

Honey & Lemon

by fragrance_anonymous
This fragrance brings me so much joy, all thanks to that one day I decided to head into macys. Try out some stuff, find out about this hobby, get into it, get into it more, get into it even more, get into it even MORE. What do you mean I can smell my memories of when I was a kid and my mother...

Ahmed Al Maghribi

Ignite Oud

by mrgambit
Ignite Oud sits not as a shadow‑chaser but as Ahmed AlMaghribi’s attempt to say something fresh with the oud material, using the same bold, occidental‑leaning DNA that runs through many of their releases while carving out its own leathery‑fruity identity. The first spray bursts with a bright,...

GranadAroma 2026: A Varied and Joyful Event. Enter For a US Give-Away!

by Hoofhearted74
Red wine accord, blackcurrent, and Frankincense alone sound lovely, this sounds like a divine fragrance! The oud, saffron and rose always seem to go together, my wife and I would love to try this brand. Thank you for your consideration.

Feminine Part of WAAW Heritage Series by Swiss Arabian

by Mrs H Sniffs
Great article. Love the breakdown of the fragrces. I'm a lover of musk 01. Haven't tried the others but by sounds of this article. Musk 07 would be something I'd enjoy

Perfumes I Love to Wear in Ramadan

by angelick

by M.D.W. Harcus

KAYALI Eden Plush Pear | 23 and Eden Sweet Peach | 35

by Ashleylovesoud
I enjoy most scents from Kayali, I don't have issues with longevity or performance. I tend to spray heavy as I would with any scent and I make sure my skin is properly hydrated. I will pick up at least a travel size and go from there

The Wedding Silk Santal | 36 Kayali Fragrances: Illuminated

by amyaz
It, to me, is not that much different than vanilla 28, but I do prefer this to that.

Inexcusable Evil by Toskovat': Perfumery as Modern Art

by Eastport
Terrific and insightful article. To me, Toskovat's Inexcusable Evil smells like what I envision the air in an ER operating room would smell like at the end of a long, bloody shift taking care of gunshot victims. Think of The Pitt. Like Daria, I too see many unusual frags such as Inexcusable...

To the Wrathful Shri Devi Who Drinks: A Review of Le Goût De Peau's Zashi Lhamo

by Marck Menke
This article is edu-tainment at its best. It's always wonderful to be introduced to something new, like the Kaliesque Zashi Lhamo. Not to mention chaanng, maotai, and me bsangs. And I do hope to sample this some day, if only to determine if the exotic-sounding notes are truly as olfactorily...

By Kilian Her Majesty: Irreverent Popcorn Floral Chypre

by Quiltomancy
popcorn? baby get your nose checked cause i own Her Majesty and there's not a bit of popcorn (or cereal) in it. dew, white peach, soft. rose, expensive powder? yes. Popcorn? No.

Some Candles For Relaxing, Reading, and More

by Tlund
I love Thé Narghilé from Nicolaï and also love the Champaca candle from Ormonde Jayne- tranquil green tea, bamboo, pink pepper, basmati rice and myrrh. So beautiful

Ormonde Jayne Announces the Four Corners REIMAGINED Collection

by CaptainMorganInDubai

Nicki Minaj Pink Friday 2

by Pollypocket82
@MinajFragrances I own a 100ml bottle of this. As it's been discontinued it's harder to find now. I love all her perfumes and own nearly everyone minus 3 that I cannot find anywhere.

Musk Therapy and Magnetic Blend 7: Two Shades of Musk From Initio

by soyeb786
Musk Therapy is one of those fragrances that quietly wins you over. At first it feels simple, but the more you wear it, the more addictive it becomes. Magnetic Blend 7, on the other hand, feels like pure musk energy—raw, sensual, and perfect for layering.
